selection_methodology: Filtered Hormozi's @AlexHormozi/videos feed for duration 10–60 min (long-form, not Shorts). View counts not available via yt-dlp flat-playlist on this run, so picks driven by title heuristics that predict heavy motion-graphics usage: explicit numbered listicles, business case studies (likely whiteboard / chart work), 'Levels' titles (ranked-hierarchy candidate per Tella claim), AI-themed (likely tweet cards + product UI screenshots).
